steps.name: sortByCustomOrder pure function
steps.criteria: sortByCustomOrder(groups, order) sorts AisleGroup[] by custom order. Null order returns default sort. Unknown sections append to end. Port + null adapter created.
steps.scenario_name: sorts groups by custom section order

steps.name: SectionOrderStorage persistence
steps.criteria: SectionOrderStorage saves and loads custom order. Null adapter works with initial order. clearOrder removes custom order.
steps.scenario_name: persists custom order to storage and loads it back

steps.name: Auto-append new sections
steps.criteria: appendNewSections detects sections not in custom order and appends them. Multiple new sections appended in order.
steps.scenario_name: new section from added item auto-appends to custom order

steps.name: Reset to default order
steps.criteria: clearOrder removes custom order. After reset, default sort used. Can create new custom order after reset.
steps.scenario_name: reset clears custom order and reverts to default sort

steps.name: useSectionOrder hook + StoreView integration
steps.criteria: useSectionOrder hook exposes order, reorder, reset. StoreView uses sortByCustomOrder with the hook's order. AsyncStorage adapter created.

steps.name: SectionOrderSettingsScreen
steps.criteria: Settings screen shows all known sections in current order. Drag-and-drop reordering. Reset to default button. Accessible from store view or home settings.
